song.title: Whispering
song.lyrics: [V1] Oh do draw me dearest Lord, I will follow close to You. You’re so full so boundless, Lord; More than I could hope to know.|| Like a pretty henna flow’r Blooming in the barren field; As the myrrh with fragrance sweet Deeply in my heart concealed.|| Oh, do hear my whisper, Lord, There’s no other Lord but You. As Your riches I partake, In Your life, mature I’ll be.
song.author: Titus Chu
